<?php namespace Tests\Feature\Auth; use Livewire\Volt\Volt; test('registration screen can be rendered', function () { $response = $this->get('/register'); $response ->assertOk() ->assertSeeVolt('pages.auth.register'); }); test('new users can register', function () { $component = Volt::test('pages.auth.register') ->set('name', 'Test User') ->set('email', 'test@example.com') ->set('password', 'password') ->set('password_confirmation', 'password'); $component->call('register'); $component->assertRedirect(route('dashboard', absolute: false)); $this->assertAuthenticated(); });
